SEARCH
Package com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto

Class AddressSyncRequest

java.lang.Object
com.berryrock.integrationhub.dto.AddressSyncRequest
public class AddressSyncRequest extends Object
Request body for the address sync REST endpoint. Sent as a JSON body to POST /api/v1/workflows/address-sync/run. The caller can use this to override runtime behavior — enabling or disabling dry-run mode, choosing which external systems to involve, and optionally pointing the pipeline at a local CSV file instead of the live Google Sheet.

  • Constructor Details

    • AddressSyncRequest

      public AddressSyncRequest()

  • Method Details

    • isDryRun

      public boolean isDryRun()
      Returns whether dry-run mode is active.
      Returns:
      true if no writes will be committed

    • setDryRun

      public void setDryRun(boolean dryRun)
      Sets the dry-run flag.
      Parameters:
      dryRun - true to suppress all write-back operations

    • isSyncGoogleSheet

      public boolean isSyncGoogleSheet()
      Returns whether matched results should be written back to Google Sheets.
      Returns:
      true if sheet write-back is enabled

    • setSyncGoogleSheet

      public void setSyncGoogleSheet(boolean syncGoogleSheet)
      Sets the Google Sheet sync flag.
      Parameters:
      syncGoogleSheet - true to enable write-back to the sheet

    • isEnrichBuildium

      public boolean isEnrichBuildium()
      Returns whether Buildium records should be fetched and used during matching.
      Returns:
      true if Buildium enrichment is enabled

    • setEnrichBuildium

      public void setEnrichBuildium(boolean enrichBuildium)
      Sets the Buildium enrichment flag.
      Parameters:
      enrichBuildium - true to include Buildium in the matching phase

    • getBatchSize

      public Integer getBatchSize()
      Returns the optional batch size limit.
      Returns:
      maximum rows to process, or null for no limit

    • setBatchSize

      public void setBatchSize(Integer batchSize)
      Sets the batch size limit.
      Parameters:
      batchSize - maximum number of sheet rows to process; null for no limit

    • getSheetId

      public String getSheetId()
      Returns the spreadsheet ID override.
      Returns:
      spreadsheet ID, or null to use the configured default

    • setSheetId

      public void setSheetId(String sheetId)
      Sets the spreadsheet ID override.
      Parameters:
      sheetId - Google Sheets spreadsheet ID

    • getSheetName

      public String getSheetName()
      Returns the sheet tab name override.
      Returns:
      tab name, or null to use the configured default

    • setSheetName

      public void setSheetName(String sheetName)
      Sets the sheet tab name override.
      Parameters:
      sheetName - name of the sheet tab within the spreadsheet

    • getCsvPath

      public String getCsvPath()
      Returns the local CSV path used in place of the live Google Sheet.
      Returns:
      absolute file path, or null to use the live sheet

    • setCsvPath

      public void setCsvPath(String csvPath)
      Sets the local CSV path.
      Parameters:
      csvPath - absolute path to a rowNumber,address CSV file
